# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened, edited]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
      PR_BODY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
      PR_NUMBER: ${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
      PR_URL: ${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}
      BRANCH_NAME: ${{ github.head_ref }}
      COMMIT_SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set notification metadata
        run: |
          echo "BUILD_MESSAGE=PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          {
            echo "BUILD_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
            echo "${PR_BODY}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> $GITHUB_ENV
          {
            echo "COMMIT_MESSAGE<<EOF"
            echo "Deploy PR #${PR_NUMBER}: ${PR_TITLE}"
            echo
            echo "Source branch: ${BRANCH_NAME}"
            echo "PR URL: ${PR_URL}"
            echo
            echo "Description:"
            echo "${PR_BODY}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Build
        run: |
          echo "Building for PR #${PR_NUMBER}"
          echo "Title: ${PR_TITLE}"

      - name: Create deployment commit message artifact
        run: |
          printf '%s\n' "${COMMIT_MESSAGE}" > deployment-commit-message.txt

      - name: Upload deployment metadata
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: pr-build-metadata
          path: |
            deployment-commit-message.txt

      - name: Notify
        env:
          NOTIFICATION_TITLE: ${{ env.BUILD_MESSAGE }}
          NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION: ${{ env.BUILD_DESCRIPTION }}
        run: |
          echo "Sending notification"
          echo "Title: ${NOTIFICATION_TITLE}"
          echo "Description:"
          echo "${NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION}"
